workload.testCase: light should reduce state:update write overhead versus full under same workload
workload.shape: unique-instance module:init + state:update pairs under identical workload; compared with mode=full vs mode=light

conclusion.writeOverhead: light avoids heavy latest* projection writes (1500 -> 0)
conclusion.timing: in this run light is faster (ratio 0.78)
notes: timing is evidence-oriented and can vary by host load
write-volume delta (latest* size) is deterministic and is the primary acceptance signal
